entry.title: I’m in the Paper!
entry.summary: Allow me to indulge in a little self-aggrandization — I was in the paper last Monday! I guess a reporter at the Edmonton Sun found a bill in her pocket marked Where’s Willy.com, took a look at it, and found my contact information on that website. A phone interview, a quick photo shoot, and a day later, I found my picture in the paper!
entry.content:
Allow me to indulge in a little self-aggrandization — I was in the paper last Monday! I guess a reporter at the Edmonton Sun found a bill in her pocket marked Where’s Willy.com, took a look at it, and found my contact information on that website. A phone interview, a quick photo shoot, and a day later, I found my picture in the paper!

“I think it’s kind of interesting to see where stuff turns up,” Minchin said. “A lot of it comes up in Alberta. I’ve had a couple in B.C., I had a couple come up in Ontario”

Check out what I wrote about Where’s Willy a year ago, the article on the Sun’s website (“Money Trackers”), and click on the picture below to check out the original article, picture included!
